checkin_30days:
Subject: 30-day check-in — how's the job search going since the workshop?

Hi [First Name],

Quick check-in from Phil — it's been about a month since you joined the AI for Job Seekers workshop at [Center Name]. How has everything been going since then?

I check in with everyone after 30 days not to sell anything, but because this workshop is still in early form and your experience helps make it better for the next group. Honestly: I need to hear what landed and what didn't.

A couple of things I'm curious about:

- Did you use any of the prompts for resume, cover letters, or interview prep? If so, where did it come in handy? If not, what stopped you?
- What's new in your job search since the workshop? Any interviews, applications, or interesting momentum?
- Was there anything frustrated you — bugs, confusing steps, a prompt that didn't work the way you expected?

No pressure to respond right away. Even a one-line reply is genuinely helpful. If you'd rather have a quick call instead, I'm happy to set that up too.

Thanks for taking the time,
Phil
aiworx4me.com
outreach@aiworx4me.com
referral_invite:
Subject: Quick favor — know someone who should try this workshop?

Hi [First Name],

Hope the job search is going well since the workshop. Quick favor — if you know a friend, classmate, or anyone who could benefit from learning practical AI for their job hunt, would you consider passing this along?

The next free 2-hour session is coming up at [Center Name]. It's the same hands-on session you did — bring a phone, bring a job description, walk out with a tailored resume and cover letter in two hours.

If they sign up, they get the same thing you did: no cost, no lecture, just working tools they can use tonight.

They can register through me directly or reach out to the center. No incentive needed at all, it's just that people I work with tend to be the folks who know other people who could use this.

Appreciated regardless of whether you have anyone in mind.

Best,
Phil
aiworx4me.com
outreach@aiworx4me.com
interview_prep_offer:
Subject: Been booked for an interview? I'd like to do a mock session with you before it.

Hi [First Name],

Fantastic news — I heard you have an interview in the next week or so. Getting the interview is the hardest part for most people, so really well done on the momentum.

I also remembered how hard practicing interview answers can feel if you're mainly doing it alone. Before the workshop, we went through the mock interview prompt together — that's the one where you role-play a live back-and-forth with AI as the hiring manager.

I'd like to do a 15-minute mock interview with you before your actual interview, live and on Zoom. We go through it together, give each question a quick run, and I give you honest feedback on how your answers landed. No record, no pressure. You're there to hear the questions and practice out loud.

If this sounds useful, just reply with your availability and I'll slot you in.

A couple quick questions while I have your attention:

- Which of the workshop prompts has been the most useful since the session?
- What area are you most nervous about in the upcoming interview?

Again, congrats on the interview. Having the foot in the door is only your first win — let's make sure you're ready when they call your name.

Best,
Phil
aiworx4me.com
outreach@aiworx4me.com
